name: DeepSearch-World: Self-Distillation for Deep Search Agents in a Verifiable Environment

four_principles_filter.去粗取精: 研讨厅按 intake_score≥0.6 + 子系统匹配入库
four_principles_filter.去伪存真: 代码级落地/规划态已在决策中标注
four_principles_filter.由表及里: 研讨厅驱动正式入库固化

digest_notes: Training tool-use agents to improve from their own experience remains challenging. We present DeepSearch-Evolve, a self-distillation framework for web agents built on DeepSearch-World, a deterministic verifiable environment with reproducible search and page-reading tools. DeepSearch-World contains 420K multi-hop QA tasks and supports key agentic cognitive behaviors: progress verification, grounded reflection, and failure recovery. Without distillation from more capable models, DeepSearch-World-9
